globalRules.title: Fail-Closed Implementation
rules: Any failure must stop execution for the current phase run.
No silent fallback to legacy implementation.

globalRules.title: Phase Validation Mandatory
rules: Each phase must produce the phase output artifacts.
Each phase must produce a pass/fail validation result.
Each phase must produce a test execution result.

globalRules.title: Evidence Storage Mandatory
rules: Evidence outputs must be stored under evidence/reports/implementation/phaseN/run_###/.

globalRules.title: Failure Handling
rules: On any failure, generate implementation_failure_report.json, root_cause.md, and remediation.md.
On any failure, stop and require human approval before re-running.

globalRules.title: Human Approval Gate
rules: After each phase, evidence must be reviewed and explicitly approved before the next phase can run.

globalRules.title: Re-run Rules
rules: Re-run requires a spec-aligned fix and a new run folder.
Re-run must never overwrite prior evidence.

globalRules.title: Locked Contract Enforcement
rules: Implementation must use design_spec.lock.json and design_audit_spec.lock.json copied from an approved designaudit Phase 1 run.
Implementation must pin its own execution contract as implementation_spec.lock.json in Phase 1.
Implementation phases must not read mutable contracts/specs/*.json directly (except Phase 1 when creating implementation_spec.lock.json).

phases.name: Implementation Context Binding
phases.objective: Bind implementation to locked, audit-approved contracts.
checks: locks are sourced from an approved designaudit phase1 run
validation: lock files exist in run directory

phases.name: Token System Alignment
phases.objective: Ensure tokens match the locked design spec contract.
checks: no hardcoded colors outside token definitions
failureConditions: hardcoded colors found in non-token CSS

phases.name: Layout System Implementation
phases.objective: Validate page-type layout contracts (reading vs landing).
failureConditions: multi-column prose detected on reading pages

phases.name: Navigation & IA Implementation
phases.objective: Align navigation and routes with the locked spec.

phases.name: Component System Implementation
phases.objective: Validate allowed component system and constraints.

phases.name: Homepage Implementation
phases.objective: Validate homepage as routing layer (not content owner).

rules.title: No duplicate headings (section label repeated as card title)
No full-card click (no Link wrapping a .card container)
Card body text is selectable (derived from no full-card click)
Desktop title row alignment enforced via CSS (sectionTitle min-height)
All homepage bands use centered inner wrappers at desktop
Explore section is compact at desktop (2-column links list)
Homepage route labels match nav labels (no Operational parts / Deeper foundations)
Readiness rail is informational (no pointer cursor / hover)

phases.name: Content Page Implementation
phases.objective: Validate canonical reading pages exist and contain required structural sections.

phases.name: Readiness Semantics Implementation
phases.objective: Validate readiness buckets and trust boundaries are present.

phases.name: Accessibility Implementation
phases.objective: Validate WCAG baseline markers (repo-local static checks).

phases.name: Performance Implementation
phases.objective: Validate performance constraints using repo-local build artifacts.

phases.name: Final Conformance Validation
phases.objective: Strictly validate latest approved designaudit Phase 11 (APPLIED) matches current repo state.
checks: latest approved designaudit phase11 is APPLIED
repo sha matches designaudit phase11 sha
validation: designaudit phase11 is approved and APPLIED
